title: Fit preprocessing on the training fold only
description: Compute normalization statistics, encoders, and imputers from the training split, then apply them to validation and test without refitting.
body: Use when scaling, encoding, or imputing features. Do not fit a scaler, vocabulary, or imputer on the full dataset before splitting — the test distribution leaks into training and the metric becomes optimistic. Actions: split first, fit transforms on train, persist the fitted parameters, and apply them unchanged to validation/test; wrap this in a pipeline so it cannot be reordered. Validation signals include identical transform parameters across folds and a metric that holds on truly unseen data. Risk boundary: leakage is invisible in offline metrics and only surfaces in production; treat any global fit-before-split as a defect and re-run the experiment.
